Used by the famous [[Gand/Legends|Gand]] [[Findsman/Legends|findsmen]] to herd their prey, the '''Gand shockstaff''' was a powerful weapon in which its stunning capability was backed up by its sharp tip. While not too powerful in a combat situation, it did deliver an electrical bonus.

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
This weapon is usually found as loot from the Gand Findsman in the [[Jekk'Jekk Tarr]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
